rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: NTDS.DIT Creation By Uncommon Process

rules.rule_text:
title: NTDS.DIT Creation By Uncommon Process
id: 11b1ed55-154d-4e82-8ad7-83739298f720
related:
- id: 4e7050dd-e548-483f-b7d6-527ab4fa784d
  type: similar
status: test
description: Detects creation of a file named "ntds.dit" (Active Directory Database)
  by an uncommon process or a process located in a suspicious directory
references:
- https://stealthbits.com/blog/extracting-password-hashes-from-the-ntds-dit-file/
- https://adsecurity.org/?p=2398
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
date: 2022-01-11
modified: 2022-07-14
tags:
- attack.credential-access
- attack.t1003.002
- attack.t1003.003
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection_ntds:
    TargetFilename|endswith: \ntds.dit
  selection_process_img:
    Image|endswith:
    - \cmd.exe
    - \cscript.exe
    - \mshta.exe
    - \powershell.exe
    - \pwsh.exe
    - \regsvr32.exe
    - \rundll32.exe
    - \wscript.exe
    - \wsl.exe
    - \wt.exe
  selection_process_paths:
    Image|contains:
    - \AppData\
    - \Temp\
    - \Public\
    - \PerfLogs\
  condition: selection_ntds and 1 of selection_process_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
